jobs.queue: resolved-at-dispatch — notifications-critical if priority=critical, else notifications
jobs.purpose: Send a Notification via push to all active subscriptions for the recipient user + application.
steps: Query PushSubscriptionRegistry: WHERE user_id + application_id + is_active + deleted_at IS NULL.
COPPA VPC gate: if recipient.consent_age_gate = minor_under_consent_age AND category.priority = marketing, refuse + audit.
For each subscription: resolve provider driver via PushTransportManager.
Build payload: alert (title + body), sound, badge, custom_data (deep_link + notification_id + category).
provider.send(device_token, payload) via HTTP or OneSignal SDK.
On invalid_token error: fire PushInvalidToken for this subscription (does NOT fail the notification — other subs may succeed).
On other error: capture in NotificationDelivery.error_code + fire PushFailed.
On success: capture provider_message_id + create NotificationDelivery(state=sent).

jobs.purpose: Soft-delete PushSubscription rows with last_seen_at < now() - 90d. Also hard-purges rows soft-deleted > 30d ago.
Normalises provider webhook payload (APNs Feedback / FCM invalid tokens / OneSignal delivery events) into PushDelivered / PushInvalidToken / PushOpened events.
Async re-validation of a device token. Dispatched on suspicion of provider revocation (e.g. delivery failed with ambiguous error). Fires PushInvalidToken if token is confirmed invalid.
